Course Articulation Matcher

UCO catalog · … courses · hybrid semantic + keyword search

Transfer course

Loading…

Runs entirely in your browser. First visit builds a semantic index of the catalog (one to a few minutes); it's cached locally afterwards.

Candidate equivalencies

Enter a transfer course on the left. Results show the top UCO catalog matches ranked by a blend of semantic similarity and keyword overlap, with credit-hour and level checks.

Similarity model: bge-small-en-v1.5 (quantized, in-browser). Scores are advisory — final articulation decisions require human review.
